
One of the issues encountered was that pulling too hard would not lose any airspeed or would completely make the plane spin out, adjusting pitch strength (found near the top) will correct this, too high and the plane will stall as soon as you pull hard, too little and the plane will will continuously gain speed as you pull hard. Balance the 2 and use the turn angle equation to calculate the turn speed you’d expect your plane to have  
![](data:image/png;base64,)
